---
title: "Circle Packing Art"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Circle Packing Art}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>", eval = FALSE)
```

Circle packing art uses `packcircles::circleProgressiveLayout()` and samples
colors from the source image.

```{r}
img <- read_art_image(system.file("extdata", "example.png", package = "ImageArtR"))
circle <- image_circle_art(img, n = 800, color_method = "center", seed = 123)
plot(circle)
```

`color_method = "mean"` and `"median"` estimate colors over each covered region
and are more expensive than center sampling.
